UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 7
Judge Pro Tem: Rachel Erlich, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Cassandra Coats.
Attorney Christina Dabis for the plaintiff.
Defendant Janee Deer is present.
Attorney Hannah Kim appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 3, 2017 is vacated. (501)
